Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class IdentityVerificationEvent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.IdentityVerificationEvent
public class IdentityVerificationEvent extends SObject

Java class for IdentityVerificationEvent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IdentityVerificationEvent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Activity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="City" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Country" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CountryIso" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Latitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginHistory" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}LoginHistory" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginHistoryId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Longitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Policy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Remarks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Resource" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ConnectedApplication" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ResourceId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subdivision" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VerificationMethod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
